original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'CANADA' and n2.n_name = 'CHINA') or (n1.n_name = 'CHINA' and n2.n_name = 'CANADA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
    n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    nation n1
JOIN supplier ON n1.n_nationkey = supplier.s_nationkey
JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    n1.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    AND n2.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    AND n1.n_name <> n2.n_name
    AND l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;

original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' and n2.n_name = 'FRANCE') or (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' and n2.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
WITH nation_pairs AS (
  SELECT n1.n_nationkey as supp_nationkey, n1.n_name as supp_nation,
         n2.n_nationkey as cust_nationkey, n2.n_name as cust_nation
  FROM nation n1
  CROSS JOIN nation n2
  WHERE n1.n_name IN ('ETHIOPIA', 'FRANCE')
    AND n2.n_name IN ('ETHIOPIA', 'FRANCE')
    AND n1.n_name <> n2.n_name
)
SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, extract(year FROM l_shipdate) as l_year,
       sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue
FROM nation_pairs
JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_nationkey = supp_nationkey
JOIN customer ON customer.c_nationkey = cust_nationkey
JOIN orders ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
JOIN lineitem ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
              AND lineitem.l_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
